Module com.example.cincuentazo
Package com.example.cincuentazo.model.game

Class GameLogic

java.lang.Object
com.example.cincuentazo.model.game.GameLogic
public class GameLogic extends Object
Central game engine that orchestrates a full game of Cincuentazo.

This class coordinates the deck, the table and the players, enforcing all the rules of the game: dealing the initial hands, validating and applying moves, drawing replacement cards, eliminating players who cannot move, recycling cards and detecting the winner.

The turn order is modeled with a Queue of players: the player whose turn it is sits at the front of the queue and, after playing, is moved to the back, which naturally produces the circular turn rotation the game requires.

This class contains pure game logic and is completely independent of JavaFX, which makes it straightforward to unit-test.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final Deck
    deck
    The deck of cards.
    private boolean
    started
    Whether the game has been set up and is ready to play.
    private final Table
    table
    The table holding the played cards and the running sum.
    private final Queue<Player>
    turnOrder
    Queue of active players defining the turn order.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameLogic(List<Player> players)
    Creates a new game engine with the given players.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canPlayerMove(Player player)
    Determines whether the given player has at least one card they could legally play given the current table sum.
    private boolean
    cardHasLegalValue(Card card)
    Checks whether a card has at least one value that would be a legal move at the current table sum.
    void
    drawAndEndTurn()
    Draws a replacement card from the deck for the current player and ends their turn, moving them to the back of the turn queue (HU-4).
    private Card
    drawFromDeck()
    Draws a card from the deck, refilling it from the table's recycled cards if it is empty.
    void
    eliminateCurrentPlayer()
    Eliminates the current player from the game, returning their cards to the bottom of the deck, and advances to the next player (HU-5).
    private void
    ensureStarted()
    Ensures the game has been set up before performing an operation.
    Player
    getCurrentPlayer()
    Returns the player whose turn it currently is, without removing them from the queue.
    int
    getRemainingPlayers()
    Returns the number of players still active in the game.
    Table
    getTable()
    Returns the table associated with this game.
    Player
    getWinner()
    Returns the winner of the game: the single remaining player.
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Checks whether the game is over, which happens when only one player remains in the turn queue (HU-6).
    void
    playCard(Card card, int chosenValue)
    Attempts to play the given card for the current player using the specified value, enforcing the core rule of the game (HU-3).
    private void
    refillDeckFromTable()
    Refills the deck by collecting the table's cards (except the top one), shuffling them and returning them to the deck.
    void
    setupGame()
    Sets up the game: deals Player.HAND_SIZE cards to each player and places the initial card on the table (HU-2).

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • deck

      private final Deck deck
      The deck of cards.

    • table

      private final Table table
      The table holding the played cards and the running sum.

    • turnOrder

      private final Queue<Player> turnOrder
      Queue of active players defining the turn order.

    • started

      private boolean started
      Whether the game has been set up and is ready to play.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameLogic

      public GameLogic(List<Player> players)
      Creates a new game engine with the given players.
      Parameters:
      players - the participating players (human + machines); must contain at least two players
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if there are fewer than two players

  • Method Details

    • setupGame

      public void setupGame() throws EmptyDeckException
      Sets up the game: deals Player.HAND_SIZE cards to each player and places the initial card on the table (HU-2).
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the deck runs out while dealing

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Returns the player whose turn it currently is, without removing them from the queue.
      Returns:
      the current player
      Throws:
      GameStateException - if the game has not been set up

    • playCard

      public void playCard(Card card, int chosenValue) throws InvalidMoveException
      Attempts to play the given card for the current player using the specified value, enforcing the core rule of the game (HU-3).
      Parameters:
      card - the card to play; must belong to the current player
      chosenValue - the value the card contributes (relevant for Aces)
      Throws:
      InvalidMoveException - if the move would make the sum exceed 50
      GameStateException - if the game has not been set up
      IllegalArgumentException - if the card is not in the player's hand

    • drawAndEndTurn

      public void drawAndEndTurn() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draws a replacement card from the deck for the current player and ends their turn, moving them to the back of the turn queue (HU-4).
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the deck is empty and cannot be refilled
      GameStateException - if the game has not been set up

    • canPlayerMove

      public boolean canPlayerMove(Player player)
      Determines whether the given player has at least one card they could legally play given the current table sum.
      Parameters:
      player - the player to check
      Returns:
      true if the player can make at least one legal move

    • eliminateCurrentPlayer

      public void eliminateCurrentPlayer()
      Eliminates the current player from the game, returning their cards to the bottom of the deck, and advances to the next player (HU-5).
      Throws:
      GameStateException - if the game has not been set up

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Checks whether the game is over, which happens when only one player remains in the turn queue (HU-6).
      Returns:
      true if only one player is left

    • getWinner

      public Player getWinner()
      Returns the winner of the game: the single remaining player.
      Returns:
      the winning player
      Throws:
      GameStateException - if the game is not yet over

    • getTable

      public Table getTable()
      Returns the table associated with this game.
      Returns:
      the game table

    • getRemainingPlayers

      public int getRemainingPlayers()
      Returns the number of players still active in the game.
      Returns:
      the number of remaining players

    • drawFromDeck

      private Card drawFromDeck() throws EmptyDeckException
      Draws a card from the deck, refilling it from the table's recycled cards if it is empty.
      Returns:
      the drawn card
      Throws:
      EmptyDeckException - if the deck is empty and cannot be refilled

    • refillDeckFromTable

      private void refillDeckFromTable()
      Refills the deck by collecting the table's cards (except the top one), shuffling them and returning them to the deck.

    • cardHasLegalValue

      private boolean cardHasLegalValue(Card card)
      Checks whether a card has at least one value that would be a legal move at the current table sum.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to check
      Returns:
      true if any of the card's possible values is legal

    • ensureStarted

      private void ensureStarted()
      Ensures the game has been set up before performing an operation.
      Throws:
      GameStateException - if the game has not been started
